  • Terminally Deprecated Elements
    Element
    Description
    org.apache.jena.riot.lang.rdfxml.ReaderRDFXML_ARP1
    org.apache.jena.riot.lang.rdfxml.RRX.RDFXML_ARP1
    To be removed. Transition only.
    org.apache.jena.sparql.ARQConstants.CDTFunctionLibraryURI
    Use CDT.CDTFunctionLibraryURI
    org.apache.jena.sparql.exec.http.QueryExecHTTP(String, Query, String, int, HttpClient, Map<String, String>, Params, Context, List<String>, List<String>, QuerySendMode, String, long, TimeUnit)
    org.apache.jena.sparql.exec.http.QueryExecHTTP.getAppProvidedAcceptHeader()
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue.makeDate(Calendar)
    Use a XMLGregorianCalendar
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue.makeDateTime(Calendar)
    Use a XMLGregorianCalendar
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.nodevalue.NodeFunctions.rdfTermEqual11_legacy(Node, Node)
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.urifunctions.SPARQLFuncOp.sparql_plus(NodeValue, NodeValue)
    Use SPARQLFuncOp.sparql_add(org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue, org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue)
    org.apache.jena.sparql.function.FunctionRegistry.get(String)
    Use FunctionRegistry.getFunctionFactory(java.lang.String)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar
    Do NOT use this class. It is related to RDF-star Community Group, not RDF 1.2.
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.decodeFromRDF(Graph)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.decodeFromRDF(Graph, StreamRDF)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.decodeFromRDFInPlace(Graph)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.encodeAsRDF(Graph)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.encodeAsRDF(Graph, StreamRDF)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.encodeAsRDFInPlace(Graph)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.reificationSubject(Node_Triple)

    Class
    Description
    org.apache.jena.riot.lang.rdfxml.ReaderRDFXML_ARP1
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar
    Do NOT use this class. It is related to RDF-star Community Group, not RDF 1.2.
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    org.apache.jena.riot.lang.rdfxml.RRX.RDFXML_ARP1
    To be removed. Transition only.
    org.apache.jena.sparql.ARQConstants.ARQFunctionLibraryURI_Jena2
    Use #ARQFunctionLibraryURI
    org.apache.jena.sparql.ARQConstants.ARQPropertyFunctionLibraryURI_Jena2
    Use #ARQFunctionLibraryURI
    org.apache.jena.sparql.ARQConstants.CDTFunctionLibraryURI
    Use CDT.CDTFunctionLibraryURI
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue.nvINF
    Use NodeValue.nvDoubleINF
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue.nvNaN
    Use NodeValue.nvDoubleNaN
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue.nvNegINF
    Use NodeValue.nvDoubleNegINF
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue.nvNegZERO
    Use NodeValue.nvDoubleNegZERO
    org.apache.jena.sparql.vocabulary.FOAF.dnaChecksum
    Archaic term. No replacement.
    org.apache.jena.sparql.vocabulary.FOAF.family_name
    Archaic term. Replaced by FOAF.familyName.
    org.apache.jena.sparql.vocabulary.FOAF.fundedBy
    Archaic term. No replacement.
    org.apache.jena.sparql.vocabulary.FOAF.geekcode
    Archaic term. No replacement.
    org.apache.jena.sparql.vocabulary.FOAF.givenname
    Archaic term. Replaced by FOAF.givenName.
    org.apache.jena.sparql.vocabulary.FOAF.holdsAccount
    Archaic term. Replaced by FOAF.account
    org.apache.jena.sparql.vocabulary.FOAF.surname
    Archaic term. Replaced by FOAF.familyName.
    org.apache.jena.sparql.vocabulary.FOAF.theme
    Archaic term. No replacement.

    Description

    org.apache.jena.riot.adapters.AdapterFileManager.getFromCache(String)

    org.apache.jena.riot.adapters.AdapterFileManager.isCachingModels()
    org.apache.jena.riot.adapters.AdapterFileManager.removeCacheModel(String)
    org.apache.jena.riot.adapters.AdapterFileManager.resetCache()
    org.apache.jena.riot.adapters.AdapterFileManager.setModelCaching(boolean)

    org.apache.jena.riot.lang.turtlejcc.javacc.SimpleCharStream.getLine()
     
    org.apache.jena.riot.protobuf.wire.PB_RDF.RDF_Literal.LiteralKindCase.valueOf(int)
    org.apache.jena.riot.protobuf.wire.PB_RDF.RDF_StreamRow.RowCase.valueOf(int)
    org.apache.jena.riot.protobuf.wire.PB_RDF.RDF_Term.TermCase.valueOf(int)
    org.apache.jena.riot.RDFParserBuilder.source(Reader)
    Use RDFParserBuilder.fromString(java.lang.String), or an InputStream or a StringReader.
    org.apache.jena.riot.RDFWriter.output(Writer)
    Using Java Writers risks corruption because of mismatch of character set. Only UTF-8 is safe.
    org.apache.jena.sparql.exec.http.QueryExecHTTP.getAppProvidedAcceptHeader()
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue.makeDate(Calendar)
    Use a XMLGregorianCalendar
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue.makeDateTime(Calendar)
    Use a XMLGregorianCalendar
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.nodevalue.NodeFunctions.rdfTermEqual11_legacy(Node, Node)
    org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.urifunctions.SPARQLFuncOp.sparql_plus(NodeValue, NodeValue)
    Use SPARQLFuncOp.sparql_add(org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue, org.apache.jena.sparql.expr.NodeValue)
    org.apache.jena.sparql.function.FunctionRegistry.get(String)
    Use FunctionRegistry.getFunctionFactory(java.lang.String)
    org.apache.jena.sparql.graph.GraphFactory.setDftGraphSameTerm(boolean)
    Do not use.

    org.apache.jena.sparql.lang.sparql_12.javacc.JavaCharStream.getLine()

    org.apache.jena.sparql.sse.lang.javacc.SimpleCharStream.getLine()
     
    org.apache.jena.system.G.containsByLang(Graph, Node, Node, Node)
    Jena5: This should not be necessary any more. Language tags are normalized during Node creation.
    org.apache.jena.system.G.findByLang(Graph, Node, Node, Node)
    Jena5: This should not be necessary any more. Language tags are normalized during Node creation.
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.decodeFromRDF(Graph)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.decodeFromRDF(Graph, StreamRDF)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.decodeFromRDFInPlace(Graph)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.encodeAsRDF(Graph)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.encodeAsRDF(Graph, StreamRDF)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.encodeAsRDFInPlace(Graph)
    org.apache.jena.system.RDFStar.reificationSubject(Node_Triple)
  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    org.apache.jena.sparql.core.Quad(Node, Node, Node, Node)
    Prefer Quad.create(Node, Node, Node, Node).
    org.apache.jena.sparql.core.Quad(Node, Triple)
    Prefer Quad.create(Node, Triple).
    org.apache.jena.sparql.engine.ExecutionContext(ExecutionContext)
    Use ExecutionContext.copy(ExecutionContext)
    org.apache.jena.sparql.engine.ExecutionContext(ExecutionContext, Graph)
    Use ExecutionContext.copyChangeActiveGraph(ExecutionContext, Graph).
    org.apache.jena.sparql.exec.http.QueryExecHTTP(String, Query, String, int, HttpClient, Map<String, String>, Params, Context, List<String>, List<String>, QuerySendMode, String, long, TimeUnit)
